top_pattern.name: Pre-Knowledge Trust Collapse — The Fig Tree Pattern
top_pattern.tech_mapping: AI-synthesized contextual briefings for pre-meeting trust acceleration. Demonstrated pre-knowledge collapses trust timelines from weeks to seconds.
top_pattern.build_spec: KnowFirst — Next.js app, Claude API for data synthesis, web scraping for data aggregation, Vercel deploy

build_ready.name: GrantPilot
build_ready.scripture: Psalm 2:8 (Ask-Receive Distribution) + John 2:1-11 (Water to Wine = commodity→premium transformation)
build_ready.tech_mapping: AI grant proposal writer. Value exists (grant funding); bottleneck is request quality (proposal writing). Claude generates complete funder-formatted proposals from simple org descriptions.
build_ready.build_spec: Next.js form + Claude API prompt chain + formatted output. Week 1 MVP: form → Claude → markdown proposal. Week 2: Word/PDF export, funder template library.
build_ready.priority: SHIP FIRST — stress-tested score 9.0/10 across 5 dimensions. Highest revenue ceiling, clearest pain, best distribution clarity
build_ready.stress_test_result: PASSED. Competitors (Grantable, Instrumentl) all US-focused. ZERO serve Africa/USAID/IFC/AfDB. First 100 customers findable TODAY.

platform_vision.name: ValleyRise
platform_vision.scripture: Isaiah 40:3-5 — Every valley lifted up, every mountain made low
platform_vision.description: All-in-one AI business launch platform for diaspora founders. Combines LogosSchema + GrantPilot + KnowFirst + DecreeDAO. One subscription, one platform.

to_buildworld.original_insight: Psalm 2 + John 1:19-51 together form a complete go-to-market system: (1) establish authority by decree, (2) fund through ask-receive, (3) build trust through referral chains, (4) convert through direct experience, (5) accelerate through pre-knowledge. Every successful SaaS company follows this pattern. Every failed one breaks a link.

to_ghanaworld.pattern_applicable: PAT-014 (Ask-Receive Distribution) maps directly to Ghana's NGO/cooperative grant funding gap. GrantPilot would serve Ghana-based organizations applying to USAID, IFC, AfDB, Mastercard Foundation, and other major funders.
to_ghanaworld.investigation_request: Which Ghana-based NGOs and cooperatives are currently losing grant opportunities due to poor proposal quality? What are the top 5 funders active in Ghana? What does a typical USAID/IFC grant application require? How large is the grant consulting market in Ghana?
to_ghanaworld.trust_chain_request: PAT-015 (Referral Chain) maps to the diaspora investment trust problem. Can GhanaWorld identify 5 diaspora investment clubs currently active in Ghana investments? What deal-flow verification mechanisms do they use?

requests_from_buildworld: New Level 3 patterns mapping to developer tools or SaaS products — delivered 3 this cycle
PAT-004 Jubilee Economics fintech product — deferred to future cycle
requests_from_ghanaworld: Supply chain integrity patterns — partially addressed by PAT-015 (TrustChain)
Quality verification at scale — future cycle priority
